title: Installation
excerpt: Install the Theme Starter and prepare your development environment for Static Website Generator.
content:
# Installation

This guide walks you through installing the Static Website Generator Theme Starter.

## Prerequisites

Before installing the Theme Starter, make sure you have the following software available:

- Node.js 22 or later
- npm
- Git

Verify your installation:

```bash
node -v
npm -v
git --version
```

## Clone the Repository

Clone the Theme Starter repository.

```bash
git clone https://github.com/staticwebsitegenerator/theme-starter.git
cd swg-theme
```

## Install Dependencies

Install all required packages.

```bash
npm install
```

## Start the Development Server

Launch the Astro development server.

```bash
npm run dev
```

The development server watches your files and automatically reloads your browser whenever changes are detected.

## Validate the Theme

Before creating a package, validate your theme.

```bash
npm run validate
```

A successful validation confirms that your theme contains all required layouts, templates and configuration files expected by Static Website Generator.

## Package the Theme

Once development is complete, package the theme.

```bash
npm run package
```

This generates an SWG theme package that can be imported directly into Static Website Generator.

## Recommended Development Workflow

```bash
git clone <repository>
cd swg-theme
npm install
npm run dev
npm run validate
npm run package
```

Following this workflow ensures your theme remains compatible with SWG throughout development.
meta_description: Install the Static Website Generator Theme Starter and prepare your development environment.
